name: The Spring Avenger
overview: At seventeen, Jiang Chunyu becomes the target of cruel bullying led by Gu Nian, a torment that ends with the heartbreaking death of her mother, the only family she had left. Years later, forged by suffering, she returns transformed into an angel of vengeance. In this gripping tale of retribution, no one will escape the consequences of her revenge.

trailers.title: 【SHORT DRAMA】THE SPRING AVENGER 上春山 TRAILER
